basic_details.job_title: RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Centre for Biotechnology (RGCB) has published the Laboratory Technologist Intern Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 15 Laboratory Technologist Intern positions. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding a Graduate Degree in Medical Laboratory Technology from approved universities or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DME approved) are eligible to apply online through the official RGCB website. The application process will be active from the notification release date to 27-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Medical Laboratory Technology from approved Universities/ Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DME approved)
qualification.details: Graduate Degree in Medical Laboratory Technology from approved Universities. Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DME approved).

selection_process: Online Application Submission Shortlisting based on eligibility Online Selection Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGCB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RGCB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGCB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern recruitment is 27th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess a Graduate Degree in Medical Laboratory Technology from an approved university or a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DME approved).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Laboratory Technologist Intern role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years as of 27th July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Laboratory Technologist Intern post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Laboratory Technologist Intern position at the Rajiv Gandhi Centre for Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 10,000 per month for the duration of the internship.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RGCB Laboratory Technologist Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Laboratory Technologist Intern role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application submission, shortlisting of eligible candidates, and an online selection interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position as a Laboratory Technologist Intern at the Rajiv Gandhi Centre for Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q9. Where is RGCB located?
faq.answer: The Rajiv Gandhi Centre for Biotechnology (RGCB) is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this internship?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official RGCB website or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section of the notification. Ensure you submit your application before the last date.
